title: Mixed Vertical Slabs
description: This mod adds the possiblity to place two diffrent vertical slabs in one block.
body:
This mod adds support to place two diffrent vertical slabs form this [mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/vertical-slabs-) in one block.

As this mod is mainly to have more options when building some things could be considerd buggy such as wrong breaking particals and that both axe and pickaxe are always the right tool. This may or may not be changed in the future.
